case_title: BUCKNER, CARRIE LEIGH VS WHERRY, JANET

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WHERRY, JANET

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-03-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-10-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 3/10/06 AT 1:30 P.M. TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE.
